SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
SELECT
GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey
,GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
,ClientID
,FileLayoutID
,FileLayoutDescription
,ClaimNumber
,OriginalClaimNumber
,BeneficiaryID
,PlanMemberID
,LineNumber
,ProcCode
,ProcCodeType
,ProcMod1
,ProcMod2
,ProcMod3
,ProcMod4
,PrimaryPaidAmt
,RevenueCode
,PlaceOfService
,ServiceFromDate
,ServiceToDate
,IsRiskAdjustable
,UniquePersonKey
,hash(concat( 
			IfNull(GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey,""),"|", 
			IfNull(GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ClientID,""),"|", 
			IfNull(FileLayoutID,""),"|", 
			IfNull(FileLayoutDescription,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ClaimNumber,""),"|", 
			IfNull(OriginalClaimNumber,""),"|", 
			IfNull(BeneficiaryID,""),"|", 
			IfNull(PlanMemberID,""),"|", 
			IfNull(LineNumber,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ProcCode,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ProcCodeType,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ProcMod1,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ProcMod2,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ProcMod3,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ProcMod4,""),"|", 
			IfNull(PrimaryPaidAmt,""),"|", 
			IfNull(RevenueCode,""),"|", 
			IfNull(PlaceOfService,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ServiceFromDate,""),"|", 
			IfNull(ServiceToDate,""),"|",
			IfNull(IsRiskAdjustable,""),"|",
			IfNull(UniquePersonKey,"")
			)) AS hashKey
	FROM (
			SELECT gc.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey
						,gc.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
						,gc.ClientID
						,gc.FileLayoutID
						,gc.FileLayoutDescription
						,gc.ClaimNumber
						,gc.OriginalClaimNumber
						,gc.BeneficiaryID
						,gc.PlanMemberID					
						,mcl.LineNumber
						,mcl.ProcCode
						,mcl.ProcCodeType
						,mcl.ProcMod1
						,mcl.ProcMod2
						,mcl.ProcMod3
						,mcl.ProcMod4
						,mcl.PrimaryPaidAmt
						,mcl.RevenueCode
						,mcl.PlaceOfService
						,mcl.ServiceFromDate
						,mcl.ServiceToDate
						,gc.IsRiskAdjustable
            ,gc.UniquePersonKey
			FROM GoldenClaim gc
			  LEFT JOIN MedicalClaimLine mcl ON gc.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = mcl.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
			UNION
			SELECT gc.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey
						,gc.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
						,gc.ClientID
						,gc.FileLayoutID
						,gc.FileLayoutDescription
						,gc.ClaimNumber
						,gc.OriginalClaimNumber
						,gc.BeneficiaryID
						,gc.PlanMemberID
						,mcl.LineNumber
						,mcl.ProcCode1 AS ProcCode
						,mcl.ProcCode1Type AS ProcCodeType
						,mcl.ProcCode1Mod1 AS ProcMod1
						,mcl.ProcMod2
						,mcl.ProcMod3
						,mcl.ProcMod4
						,mcl.PrimaryPaidAmt
						,mcl.RevenueCode
						,mcl.PlaceOfService
						,mcl.ServiceFromDate
						,mcl.ServiceToDate
						,gc.IsRiskAdjustable
            ,gc.UniquePersonKey
			FROM GoldenClaim gc
			  INNER JOIN MedicalClaimLine mcl ON gc.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = mcl.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
			WHERE mcl.ProcCode1 IS NOT NULL
			OR mcl.ProcCode1Type IS NOT NULL
			OR mcl.ProcCode1Mod1 IS NOT NULL
			)q
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING ( 
     SELECT 
          ss.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey          
          ,ifnull(ss.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey,dt.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey) as GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
          ,ss.ClientID
          ,ss.FileLayoutID
          ,ss.FileLayoutDescription
          ,ss.ClaimNumber
          ,ss.OriginalClaimNumber
          ,ss.BeneficiaryID
          ,ss.PlanMemberID
          ,ifnull(ss.LineNumber, dt.LineNumber) as LineNumber						
          ,ifnull(ss.ProcCode, dt.ProcCode) as ProcCode
          ,ss.ProcCodeType
          ,ss.ProcMod1
          ,ss.ProcMod2
          ,ss.ProcMod3
          ,ss.ProcMod4
          ,ss.PrimaryPaidAmt
          ,ss.RevenueCode
          ,ss.PlaceOfService
          ,ss.ServiceFromDate
          ,ss.ServiceToDate
          ,ss.IsRiskAdjustable
          ,ss.hashKey
          ,ss.UniquePersonKey
      FROM tempSQLScript ss
      FULL OUTER JOIN DestinationTable dt 
      ON ss.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = dt.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
				AND IFNULL(ss.ProcCode,"|") = IFNULL(dt.ProcCode,"|")
				AND IFNULL(ss.LineNumber,0) = IFNULL(dt.LineNumber,0)
  )s 
ON s.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = t.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
     AND IFNULL(s.ProcCode,"|") = IFNULL(t.ProcCode,"|")
     AND IFNULL(s.LineNumber,0) = IFNULL(t.LineNumber,0) 
WHEN MATCHED AND s.hashKey is null THEN DELETE 
WHEN MATCHED AND s.hashKey is not null AND s.hashKey <> t.hashKey 
THEN UPDATE SET 
     GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey = s.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey
		,GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = s.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
		,ClientID = s.ClientID
		,FileLayoutID = s.FileLayoutID
		,FileLayoutDescription = s.FileLayoutDescription
		,ClaimNumber = s.ClaimNumber
		,OriginalClaimNumber = s.OriginalClaimNumber
		,BeneficiaryID = s.BeneficiaryID
		,PlanMemberID = s.PlanMemberID
		,LineNumber = s.LineNumber
		,ProcCode = s.ProcCode
		,ProcCodeType = s.ProcCodeType
		,ProcMod1 = s.ProcMod1
		,ProcMod2 = s.ProcMod2
		,ProcMod3 = s.ProcMod3
		,ProcMod4 = s.ProcMod4
		,PrimaryPaidAmt = s.PrimaryPaidAmt
		,RevenueCode = s.RevenueCode
		,PlaceOfService = s.PlaceOfService
		,ServiceFromDate = s.ServiceFromDate
		,ServiceToDate = s.ServiceToDate
		,IsRiskAdjustable = s.IsRiskAdjustable
		,hashKey = s.hashKey
        ,UniquePersonKey=s.UniquePersonKey
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT 
( 
     GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey
		,GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
		,ClientID
		,FileLayoutID
		,FileLayoutDescription
		,ClaimNumber
		,OriginalClaimNumber
		,BeneficiaryID
		,PlanMemberID
		,LineNumber
		,ProcCode
		,ProcCodeType
		,ProcMod1
		,ProcMod2
		,ProcMod3
		,ProcMod4
		,PrimaryPaidAmt
		,RevenueCode
		,PlaceOfService
		,ServiceFromDate
		,ServiceToDate
		,IsRiskAdjustable
		,HashKey
        ,UniquePersonKey
) 
VALUES 
( 
		s.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey
		,s.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
		,s.ClientID
		,s.FileLayoutID
		,s.FileLayoutDescription
		,s.ClaimNumber
		,s.OriginalClaimNumber
		,s.BeneficiaryID
		,s.PlanMemberID
		,s.LineNumber
		,s.ProcCode
		,s.ProcCodeType
		,s.ProcMod1
		,s.ProcMod2
		,s.ProcMod3
		,s.ProcMod4
		,s.PrimaryPaidAmt
		,s.RevenueCode
		,s.PlaceOfService
		,s.ServiceFromDate
		,s.ServiceToDate
		,s.IsRiskAdjustable
		,s.HashKey
        ,s.UniquePersonKey)
